query:
SELECT m.id, m.scientific_name, mt.trade_name, mi.indication, mc.code_id, ic.code, ic.description
FROM medications m
LEFT JOIN medication_trade_names mt ON mt.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN medication_indications mi ON mi.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN medication_codes mc ON mc.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN icd_codes ic ON ic.id = mc.code_id
WHERE LOWER(mt.trade_name) LIKE '%dayvigo%'
LIMIT 10;
command:

FROM medications m
LEFT JOIN medication_trade_names mt ON mt.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN medication_indications mi ON mi.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN medication_codes mc ON mc.medication_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN icd_codes ic ON ic.id = mc.code_id
WHERE LOWER(mt.trade_name) LIKE '%dayvigo%'
